laetum.description: High DPS Incarnon build focused on status and critical chance. Activate Incarnon form for maximum burst damage.

mesa.description: Peacemaker DPS build. Use Shooting Gallery for damage buff and Shatter Shield for survivability.

saryn.description: Spore spread nuke build. Great for Steel Path and endurance runs. Spread spores with Molt for area clear.

kuva_bramma.description: Explosive crit build. Best used against groups of enemies. Pair with a fire rate source for faster reloads.

wisp.description: Support/damage hybrid. Drop Reservoirs for team buffs. Shock Mote provides CC while Haste Mote boosts fire rate.

torid.description: Gas status cloud build. Excellent for Incarnon mode. Pairs well with Saryn or any frame that benefits from toxin procs.
